label: The Underlumen Bunkroom
description: The Underlumen Bunkroom forms a narrow sleeping chamber cut from the inspection hall’s former records alcove, its ferrocrete shell clad in patched void-black plating. Tiered bunks of riveted metal line the walls in strict rows, with lockable ration-chests set beneath each frame and a single folding desk bolted to the floor. Lumen-shielded strips emit a constant, regulated glow that never fully dispels the tavern’s prevailing dim, while brass-grilled vents and an overworked scrubber keep the air sharp with disinfectant. A slit-window set high in the wall admits a thin wash of bruise-hued aurorae, flattening color into austere grey-blue tones.
